offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes time inefficiencies. We automate data extraction instead of manual entry into accounting software.
problem: Manual data entry is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tool sharing
try_it: Let users try a user-friendly interface for adjustments
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
